sources.name: Marine Map Tool
sources.citation: Kandemiroglu, O.C. (2026). Marine Map Tool (v{version}). https://osmancankandemiroglu.com/app/ — DOI pending (Zenodo, see CITATION.cff).
sources.note: DOI pending — mint a version-specific DOI via Zenodo on the first tagged release (see CITATION.cff), then update this entry.

sources.name: Terrain Tiles on AWS Open Data
sources.licence: Public domain sources / Mapzen attribution requested
sources.citation: Terrain Tiles on AWS Open Data (Mapzen/Linux Foundation). DEM sources include ETOPO1 (NOAA), SRTM (NASA), GMTED2010 (USGS), and others. https://registry.opendata.aws/terrain-tiles/
sources.note: Composite of public-domain DEMs; the underlying source varies by location and zoom level.

sources.name: ETOPO 2022 15 Arc-Second Global Relief Model
sources.citation: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information (2022): ETOPO 2022 15 Arc-Second Global Relief Model. NOAA NCEI. https://doi.org/10.25921/fd45-gt74

sources.name: GEBCO 2024 Grid
sources.note: VERIFY current grid release before shipping — GEBCO issues a new grid most years.

sources.name: Natural Earth
sources.citation: Natural Earth. Free vector and raster map data. https://www.naturalearthdata.com/ (public domain).
sources.note: No attribution legally required; credit appreciated.

sources.name: cmocean colormaps
sources.citation: Thyng, K.M., Greene, C.A., Hetland, R.D., Zimmerle, H.M., & DiMarco, S.F. (2016). True colors of oceanography: Guidelines for effective and accurate colormap selection. Oceanography 29(3):9-13. https://doi.org/10.5670/oceanog.2016.66

sources.name: EMODnet Digital Bathymetry (DTM)
sources.citation: EMODnet Bathymetry Consortium: EMODnet Digital Bathymetry (DTM). https://emodnet.ec.europa.eu/en/bathymetry
sources.note: VERIFY the DTM release year + DOI when the EMODnet layer ships (Phase 3).

sources.name: MarineRegions.org
sources.citation: Flanders Marine Institute — MarineRegions.org (EEZ/IHO products). https://www.marineregions.org/
sources.note: Phase 3 overlay; per-product citation required when used.

sources.name: Generic Mapping Tools (GMT)
sources.citation: Wessel, P., et al. (2019). The Generic Mapping Tools version 6. Geochemistry, Geophysics, Geosystems, 20, 5556-5564. https://doi.org/10.1029/2019GC008515

sources.name: PyGMT
sources.citation: Uieda, L., et al. PyGMT: A Python interface for the Generic Mapping Tools. https://www.pygmt.org/
sources.note: Cite the version-specific Zenodo DOI of the PyGMT release you run (see pygmt.org).
